title: Mallostoma cachirensis
taxonomy: Mallostoma cachirensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the genus Mallostoma which is part of the order Malpighiales. The plant is native to South America and is a member of the Malpighiaceae family, which is a group of plants commonly known as barberry or tree-barberry. The classification of Mallostoma cachirensis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The classification of Mallostoma cachirensis is still a subject of ongoing research and study.
